name: HeyOrca
description:
What HeyOrca Does

HeyOrca is a social media management tool for collaboration between team players and clients. Coordination using the unified calendar enhances client collaboration, making HeyOcra a good fit for agencies and SMBs. White label branding is available with the top tier “Pro” plan: 

HeyOrca is designed to streamline content planning, scheduling, and posting with powerful collaboration and reporting tools.

Key Features

Main features of HeyOrca:

  • White-label branding is available with the top-tier “Pro” plan.
  • The powerful collaboration and reporting tools streamline content planning, scheduling, and posting.
  • HeyOrca’s other features: some text
    • Bulk post-creation 
    • Content planning and scheduling with a visual calendar 
    • Internal and external collaboration   

Benefits of HeyOrca

The benefits for clients of HeyOrca are: 

  • Apply your brand aesthetics with the platform’s white-label features (available with the Pro-plan) 
  • Content planning, scheduling, and posting.
  • Improved efficiency with streamlined content management 
  • Better client relationships through transparency and streamlined approval workflow.
  • Optimized teamwork and improved coordination with clients. 

Pricing

Three plans are available: 

  • Basic: USD 59 /month
  • Standard: USD 99 /month  
  • Pro: USD 149/month  

Pros

✅User-friendly interface 

✅Simplified client reviews and approval workflows

✅White Label features 

Cons

🚫Limited features  

🚫Realtive high pricing
